store_headline: Minimalist WooCommerce Theme for Boutique and Lifestyle Brands
store_subheadline: Launch a clean WooCommerce store where products lead — no clutter, no noise.
features: Minimalist design philosophy with clean, uncluttered aesthetics
WooCommerce-optimized layouts for focused product presentation
Portfolio integration for brand storytelling and lookbooks
Wishlist functionality for streamlined customer experience
Elementor page builder with minimalist design elements
Contact forms for customer service and inquiries
Video thumbnail generation for subtle product demonstrations
Refined typography and generous white space
Mobile-optimized responsive design with minimal distractions
One-click demo import with complete minimalist store setups
selling_points: Japanese kanji brand mark (静寂 = stillness) — the only WooCommerce theme with a design philosophy embedded here
Earthy olive/tan tones that signal artisanal quality before a visitor reads a single product description
Built for brands whose product is strong enough to sell itself — no shouting required
Distraction-free product presentation where white space does the selling
WooCommerce wishlist and clean checkout UX designed for the intentional, considered purchase
Elementor-powered with minimalist design elements — flexibility without visual clutter
The only theme in the catalog that turns Japanese-influenced restraint into a commercial advantage
Wins by doing less, better — positioned against brands that overpromise
key_benefits: Sell products without shouting — Japanese stillness as a commercial advantage
Convert conscious shoppers who buy with intention, not impulse
Build a boutique store where the product is the entire design statement
Attract premium buyers who associate minimalism with quality and trust
Launch a WooCommerce store that feels like a curated Tokyo concept shop
Differentiate from loud competitors through deliberate, principled restraint
Create a buying experience where every design element earns its place
design_features: Minimalist product catalog with generous spacing
Clean typography and restrained color palettes
Portfolio integration for brand stories and lookbooks
White space as a design element
use_cases: Quality Stationery and Paper Goods Shops

testimonials.text: Seijaku embodies the minimalist philosophy we've built our brand around. The clean design lets our handcrafted products be the focus, and our conversion rate has increased by 35% since launch. Customers consistently comment on the peaceful shopping experience.
testimonials.author: artisanbrand

testimonials.text: As a sustainable fashion brand, we needed a website that reflected our values of quality over quantity. Seijaku's minimalist aesthetic perfectly complements our philosophy, and the wishlist feature encourages thoughtful, intentional purchases rather than impulse buying.
testimonials.author: sustainablefashion

testimonials.text: Our premium home goods store chose Seijaku for its sophisticated simplicity. The generous white space and clean layouts make our products shine, and we've received amazing feedback from customers who appreciate the calm, uncluttered shopping environment.
testimonials.author: homegoods
